creator: trueos@norwegianrockcat.com
text:
Created attachment 233056
Patch from 1.0.4 to 1.0.6

Update ros-urdfdom_headers from 1.0.4 to 1.0.6

No accompanying changelog, but the headers have moved into a urdfdom_headers directory and cmake files have been updated. These changes seem to be necessary     for later versions of ros-urdfdom
